name: Roshidere / Alya sometimes hides her feelings in russian
description:
Let’s just say this is a 'test' for now. Most of the information is included, with credits to the wiki for the sources. I put this together rather quickly, mainly to see how it would work in practice. If you end up liking it, I might consider updating or expanding it—but honestly, I’m not completely sure yet.

I also want to mention that I can’t promise everything is perfectly accurate, so please don’t get upset if you notice any mistakes. Remember, this was made in a hurry, and I mainly wanted to get a basic version out there.
On the other hand, I have no idea how to make an RPG, or whatever this is calledm, so please, don’t bother me.
On the other hand, use a damn GOOD proxy. JLLM is basically just:

using JLLM = the biggest mess possible.

And about updating bots from this series? Well… I don’t know. Maybe I should update Alya, but I doubt it’ll be anytime soon (plus, I’d have to fix her damn awful description).

And yesterday, sorry, I accidentally published a bot by mistake. My mind completely failed me, and it took me an hour to realize that I had posted that 'test' bot.


  • Info: Roshidere wiki.
creator: Maxx23
